dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "Alright, VEDA, what've we got on the latest case?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "Looks like another high-society type's gone missing, Jax. This one's got connections to the upper echelons."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "I've got a list of suspects, but nothing concrete. Whoever did this is good."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAX, eyes narrowing behind his mirrored shades.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "Good doesn't cut it in this town. Get me everything you've got on the victim."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "I've got a bad feeling about this, Veda."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "Just what I need, your intuition. Let's focus on the facts."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "You're not seeing the big picture, Veda. This is more than just another missing person."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "I am seeing it, Jax. That's why I want to get in and out. We can't just barge in without a plan."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAX, looking up at the warehouse with a mix of caution and curiosity.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "Fine. Let's get moving. But if anyone gets hurt, it's on you."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "This is it, Jax. This is where they took him."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.line: "Look closer. There's a hidden compartment behind that crate."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JAX
dialogue.line: "You're a genius, Veda. But what's inside?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEDA
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: JAX
characters.personality: Jax is a driven and pragmatic individual who prioritizes results over morals, as evidenced by his willingness to push for more information despite knowing the darkness of the city. His skepticism and intuition suggest a character who has learned to trust his instincts.
characters.appearance: Jax likely wears functional and durable clothing, possibly with a mix of leather and synthetic materials, reflecting his occupation as a cyberpunk detective in a gritty urban environment. His attire may also incorporate elements of a utilitarian aesthetic, such as tactical gear or cybernetic enhancements.
characters.style_reference: Cyberpunk neo-noir, dark and gritty visuals, high contrast color palette with neon accents.
